promotionDelta: Generate and verify source/package/registry/docs outputs, dependency closure, and the public subpath export.
Record two-, three-, nested-, vertical-, controlled-, uncontrolled-, collapse-, and restore-panel browser behavior.
Complete manual screen-reader value, keyboard-only, speech, switch, touch, and forced-colors sessions for this Risk Class 2 component.
Verify the persistence adapter, read/write failure recovery, SSR hydration, and no storage access during server rendering.
Record 320 CSS pixel and 400% zoom sequential mode without hidden actions, horizontal panning, or reading-order changes.
Pass packed Next.js and Vite consumers plus package/source behavior parity.
Add Semantic Sync clean-update, customized-update, conflict, rollback, and removal fixtures.
